channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kalshi Promo Code FOXSPORTS: Get $10 Bonus After Your First $10 Trade
item.description: Use Kalshi promo code FOXSPORTS to get a $10 bonus after trading $10. Learn how Kalshi works, where it’s legal, and how prediction markets differ from...

item.title: Underdog Promo Code FOXSPORTS: Play $5 Get $50 in Bonus Entries
item.description: Claim the Underdog Fantasy promo code and unlock $50 in bonus cash when you play just $5. Learn how to claim, terms, app features, and more.

item.title: Best Sportsbook Promos & Bonus Bets - April 2026 Top Offers
item.description: Discover the best sportsbook promos and bonus bets for April 2026. Compare welcome offers and top bonuses from leading betting sites.

item.title: DraftKings Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $300 in Bonus Bets If Your Bet Wins
item.description: Bet $5, get $300 in Bonus Bets If Your Bet Wins for New Users.

item.title: Best Sports Betting Apps 2026: Top Betting Sites Reviewed
item.description: Compare the best sports betting apps and sites for 2026. See reviews, bonuses, and features to help choose the right sportsbook for your needs.

item.title: Shiver: U-M didn't protect me enough from Moore
item.description: Former Michigan football staffer Paige Shiver characterized her relationship with Sherrone Moore as an "open secret" within the athletic department an...

item.title: 👀 NFL draft trade grades: Assessing Round 1 swaps
item.description: We're grading the most impactful trades of the 2026 NFL draft, including three deals by the Bills.

item.title: Open to work no more: Mendoza celebrates with a LinkedIn post after taken at No. 1
item.description: The new Las Vegas Raiders quarterback is frequently active on the platform and has posted about multiple career milestones.

item.title: Drafted in drip: Looking at the best outfits from the 2026 NFL draft
item.description: The stars stepped out in their best suits ahead of hearing their names called in the 2026 NFL draft.

item.title: Rams take Simpson, note 'this is Matthew's team'
item.description: The Rams selected quarterback Ty Simpson with the 13th pick in the NFL draft, though coach Sean McVay made it clear: "This is Matthew's team."
